stream.name: NETCONF
stream.description: Default NETCONF stream containing notifications from all the modules. Replays only notifications for modules (streams) that support replay.

stream.name: ietf-yang-library
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-netconf-notifications
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: nc-notifications
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-keystore
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-truststore
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-network-instance
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-subscribed-notifications
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-yang-push
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: goldstone-telemetry
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: ietf-alarms
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: openconfig-system
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.

stream.name: org-openroadm-pm
stream.description: Stream with all the notifications of a module.
